name: [GRIDHAND] Appointment Flow Agent - Calendly booked → add to CRM → confirmation SMS → 24hr remin

gridhand.scenario: Calendly booked → add to CRM → confirmation SMS → 24hr reminder → 2hr reminder
gridhand.description: When a customer books an appointment through Calendly, the workflow is triggered, automatically adding the customer's information to the business's CRM system, such as HubSpot, and sending a confirmation SMS to the customer through Twilio, ensuring they receive instant notification of their scheduled appointment. Over the next 24 hours, the workflow sends a reminder SMS to the customer, and then another reminder just 2 hours before the appointment, both designed to reduce no-shows and keep customers engaged, ultimately resulting in a more streamlined and reliable scheduling process for the business owner. By automating these tasks, the business owner can focus on providing excellent service, knowing that appointments are being managed efficiently and customers are being kept informed every step of the way.
